title: royena heterotricha
intro: Royena heterotricha is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, commonly known as a type of Sapodilla tree. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Royena heterotricha include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant's leaves and bark are often used in traditional medicine, and can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
